title: Dropdown options from a Group Item list
excerpt: We have a Board with client information that is automated to populate based on whether the client status changes from a Lead to an actual Client. The client names that are populated as Items need to be used by other depa…

posts.author: fattonymtb (Anthony Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a Board with client information that is automated to populate based on whether the client status changes from a Lead to an actual Client. The client names that are populated as Items need to be used by other departments in their own board items. Is there a way to make an Items list auto-populate a dropdown column list?
